label: Yazi
command: fish -lc 'set -l start "$ZED_FILE"; if test -z "$start"; set start "$ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT"; end; if test -z "$start"; set start "$PWD"; end; set -l tmp (mktemp -t "yazi-chooser.XXXXX"); yazi "$start" --chooser-file="$tmp"; set -l opened_file (string trim (head -n 1 "$tmp" 2>/dev/null)); rm -f -- "$tmp"; if test -n "$opened_file"; zed -- "$opened_file"; end'
